name: Mathematics
description: From pre-algebra foundations through calculus and linear algebra. Rebuild your math intuition from the ground up.

name: Science Literacy
description: Understand how the world works. Physics, chemistry, and the scientific method.

name: Computer Science
description: Learn to think like a programmer. From Python basics to algorithms and system design.

name: Programming with Python
description: Learn Python from scratch. Variables, functions, data structures, and libraries for data analysis and trading.

name: Probability & Statistics
description: The math of uncertainty. From basic probability to Monte Carlo simulations — the tools every trader and data thinker needs.

name: Artificial Intelligence
description: From basic ML to LLMs, agents, and the future. Understand the tech reshaping everything.

name: Personal Finance
description: Budgeting, saving, investing, credit, and taxes. Master your money before you risk it.

name: Trading & Markets
description: From market fundamentals to perpetual futures and prediction markets. Learn to read price action, manage risk, and think in probabilities.

name: Engineering Fundamentals
description: The art and science of designing systems that work. From feedback loops to signal processing, engineering thinking helps you model, optimize, and debug complex systems — including your trading strategies.
